meaning: n.驿马,接替,[电工]继电器vt.(消息,货物等)分程传递,使接替,转播vi.得到接替,转播
examples: They raced to a thrilling victory in the relay.
The satellite will be used mainly to relay television programmes.
Britain's prospects of beating the United States in the relay looked poor.
Garland has made fairly regular appearances in the relay over the past three or four years.
I'm thankful that I never trash-talked the American Men's Freestyle Relay Team before racing them.
